title: PolicyDecision
description: final.md 12.4 / contracts.rs PolicyDecision. The deterministic admission result for an action manifest. Invariants: denied actions cannot be executed; review-required actions cannot execute before approval; policy decisions are journaled before execution. Note: the wire format binds each decision to the manifest it decided on via 'manifest_hash' (not named in final.md 12.4 prose); and final.md 12.4 lists 'matched_rules'/'required_review'/'required_simulation' as required, whereas the wire format makes them optional (serde default).
